FIGHTER_CARD_STRIKE_FIGHTER.title: Strike
FIGHTER_CARD_DEFEND_F.title: Defend
FIGHTER_CARD_STRIKE_L.title: Light Attack
FIGHTER_CARD_STRIKE_H.title: Heavy Attack
FIGHTER_CARD_STRIKE_H.description:
[gold]Combo[/gold]: Consume Combo, refund [blue]2[/blue] Energy,
consume [blue]3[/blue] frames.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
FIGHTER_CARD_COMMAND_GRAB.title: Command Grab
FIGHTER_CARD_COMMAND_GRAB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Consume [blue]6[/blue] frames.
[gold]Throw[/gold]: Ignores Block.
FIGHTER_CARD_DRIVE_RUSH.title: Drive Rush
FIGHTER_CARD_DRIVE_RUSH.description:
Fighting Spirit {Frames:diff()}:
Consume [blue]2[/blue] Fighting Spirit, gain {Frames:diff()} frames.
If insufficient spirit, effect [red]reduced by 25%[/red].
FIGHTER_CARD_HADOKEN.title: Hadoken
FIGHTER_CARD_HADOKEN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If no other attack has been played
this turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] frames.
FIGHTER_CARD_SHORYUKEN.title: Shoryuken
FIGHTER_CARD_SHORYUKEN.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [blue]2[/blue] frames.
If the enemy intends to [red]Attack[/red],
deal +30% damage.
FIGHTER_CARD_TATSUMAKI.title: Tatsumaki Senpu-kyaku
FIGHTER_CARD_TATSUMAKI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Gain [blue]1[/blue] frame per hit.
If you have ≥5 frames, attack one
extra time.
FIGHTER_CARD_DRAGONLASH_KICK.title: Dragonlash Kick
FIGHTER_CARD_JINRAI_KICK.title: Jinrai Kick
FIGHTER_CARD_JINRAI_KICK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times.
[gold]Combo[/gold]: +1 damage per hit.
FIGHTER_CARD_QUICK_DASH.title: Quick Dash
FIGHTER_CARD_QUICK_DASH.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Gain [blue]2[/blue] frames.
Draw 1 card.
If you spend 1 Fighting Spirit,
draw 1 additional card.
FIGHTER_CARD_SPIRAL_ARROW.title: Spiral Arrow
FIGHTER_CARD_SPIRAL_ARROW.description:
[gold]Starter[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you already have Combo, gain [blue]1[/blue] frame.
FIGHTER_CARD_CANNON_SPIKE.title: Cannon Spike
FIGHTER_CARD_CANNON_SPIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to [red]Attack[/red],
+5 damage and apply 1 [red]Vulnerable[/red].
FIGHTER_CARD_QUICK_SPIN_KNUCKLE.title: Quick Spin Knuckle
FIGHTER_CARD_QUICK_SPIN_KNUCKLE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Ignores Block.
Gain [blue]1[/blue] frame.
FIGHTER_CARD_CANNON_STRIKE.title: Cannon Strike
FIGHTER_CARD_CANNON_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this is your first Attack this turn,
refund [blue]1[/blue] Energy.
FIGHTER_CARD_HELL_SPIKE.title: Hell Spike
FIGHTER_CARD_DOUBLE_LARIAT.title: Double Lariat
FIGHTER_CARD_DOUBLE_LARIAT.description:
[gold]Special[/gold] [gold]Cancel 2[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice.
Spend [blue]5[/blue] frames, draw 2 cards.
FIGHTER_CARD_TAUNT.title: Taunt
FIGHTER_CARD_TAUNT.description:
Lose [blue]5[/blue] frames.
Gain [gold]2[/gold] Strength.
Upgraded gives [gold]3[/gold].
FIGHTER_CARD_SAFE_JUMP.title: Safe Jump
FIGHTER_CARD_TC_CARD.title: TC
FIGHTER_CARD_TC_CARD.description: When Combo is consumed, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
FIGHTER_CARD_CONFIRM_CARD.title: Confirm
FIGHTER_CARD_CONFIRM_CARD.description: Combo and Cancel cards deal [gold]+50%[/gold] damage.
FIGHTER_CARD_WHIFF_PUNISH_CARD.title: Whiff Punish
FIGHTER_CARD_WHIFF_PUNISH_CARD.descripti:
When hitting an enemy that intends to Attack,
gain [blue]2[/blue] extra frames.
Upgraded: [blue]3[/blue] frames.
FIGHTER_CARD_STRIKE_THROW_MIXUP_CARD.des:
Attacks ignore Block.
Throw cards' frame cost [blue]-3[/blue].
FIGHTER_CARD_ASHURA_SENKU.title: Ashura Senku
FIGHTER_CARD_TUNDRA_STORM.title: Tundra Storm
FIGHTER_CARD_TUNDRA_STORM.description:
Gain [gold]1[/gold] Buffer.
Recover all damage taken this turn.
Upgraded grants [gold]2[/gold] Buffer.
FIGHTER_CARD_GRAND_STORM.title: Grand Theatre Storm Buster
FIGHTER_CARD_GRAND_STORM.description:
[gold]Throw[/gold] [gold]Super 3[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to target.
Deal half to all other enemies.
Restore [blue]3[/blue] Fighting Spirit.
Consume all frames to boost damage.
FIGHTER_CARD_THE_DEVIL_INSIDE.title: The Devil Inside
FIGHTER_CARD_THE_DEVIL_INSIDE.descriptio:
Gain 1 [gold]Tipsy[/gold] (max 4) and {Block:diff()} Block.
If you played a [gold]Starter[/gold] card this turn, gain an additional [blue]3[/blue] frames.
FIGHTER_CARD_LUMINOUS_DIVE_KICK.title: Luminous Dive Kick
FIGHTER_CARD_LUMINOUS_DIVE_KICK.descript:
[gold]Cancel 1[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Tipsy[/gold] ≥ 1, deal damage again and gain 1 [gold]Combo[/gold].
FIGHTER_CARD_BAKKAI.title: Bakkai
FIGHTER_CARD_BAKKAI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times.
If [gold]Tipsy[/gold] ≥ 2, consume 1 [gold]Combo[/gold] for 2 extra hits.
FIGHTER_CARD_TENSHIN.title: Tenshin
FIGHTER_CARD_TENSHIN.description:
Consume [blue]4[/blue] frames, apply 2 [red]Vulnerable[/red].
If [gold]Tipsy[/gold] ≥ 3, cost becomes 0 and apply 1 [gold]Cancel[/gold].
FIGHTER_CARD_GETSUGA_SAIHO.title: Getsuga Saiho
FIGHTER_CARD_GETSUGA_SAIHO.description:
[gold]Super 3[/gold].
Consume 3 [gold]Super Gauge[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Tipsy[/gold] is 4 (max), double damage and refund all spent [gold]Super Gauge[/gold].
FIGHTER_CARD_THE_DEVILS_SONG.title: The Devil's Song
FIGHTER_CARD_THE_DEVILS_SONG.description:
[gold]Super 2[/gold].
Consume 2 [gold]Super Gauge[/gold].
This turn and next, your [gold]Tipsy[/gold] is treated as 4 (max) and each attack gains [blue]1[/blue] frame.
